Package egovframework.let.cop.com.service.impl

Class EgovUserInfManageServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl
egovframework.let.cop.com.service.impl.EgovUserInfManageServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
EgovUserInfManageService
@Service("EgovUserInfManageService") public class EgovUserInfManageServiceImpl extends org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl implements EgovUserInfManageService
협업에서 사용할 사용자 조회 서비스 기능 구현 클래스
Since:
2009.04.06
Version:
1.0
Author:
공통서비스개발팀 이삼섭
